prompt: Create a highly detailed anime-style vertical portrait of a beautiful angel girl in a Japanese shrine garden during cherry blossom season. The character is a young woman with very long flowing silver-white hair, soft pale skin, a gentle smile, and heterochromia with one bright blue eye and one glowing amber-orange eye. She wears a pale pink floral kimono with a deep magenta obi sash, decorated with subtle sakura patterns. Add exactly 3 major accessories: a luminous white halo floating above her head, a large pink sakura hair ornament with dangling gold chains and red tassels on the right side of her hair, and a pair of soft white feathered angel wings visible behind her. Pose her in a close-up three-quarter view, looking back over her shoulder toward the viewer while holding one hand near her face in a V-sign peace gesture. The scene should feel bright, romantic, and ethereal, with dappled sunlight and cherry blossom branch shadows falling across her face, hair, kimono, and wings. Background: a softly blurred traditional Japanese shrine or temple courtyard with wooden railings, a stone lantern, water or garden elements, and abundant pink cherry blossoms. Use delicate linework, glossy eyes, luminous rim light, pastel pinks and cool blues, ultra-detailed hair strands and feathers, soft depth of field, cinematic sunlight, high-resolution anime illustration quality. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
